jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Thyrocare
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Thyrocare in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Thyrocare:
Thyrocare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Thyrocare!
